name: Archer Aviation Inc.
business: Archer is developing the Midnight electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft for air taxi operations and a dual-use hybrid-electric autonomous VTOL aircraft for defense and commercial cargo. The company plans to sell aircraft, technologies, and services to commercial air taxi operators, defense customers, and international governments, and also aims to provide direct-to-consumer air taxi services in select metropolitan areas.

exposures.sentence: Midnight is our electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft purpose-built for air taxi operations globally.
We are also advancing a dual-use hybrid-electric, autonomous vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) aircraft platform for both defense and commercial customers.
We are also developing artificial intelligence (AI) and autonomy technologies to support the advancement of our air traffic control system from concept to a scalable reality.

catalysts.event: Midnight's Means of Compliance fully FAA accepted
catalysts.sentence: in January 2026, Midnight's Means of Compliance was fully FAA accepted.

catalysts.event: Began piloted test flight phase of Midnight program
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we began the piloted test flight phase of our Midnight program.

catalysts.event: First deal for third-party adoption of electric powertrain in defense sector
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we announced our first deal for third-party adoption of these technologies in the defense sector, with Anduril and EDGE Group choosing to use our electric powertrain to power their Omen autonomous air vehicle.

catalysts.event: Delivery of additional Midnight aircraft for initial passenger operations
catalysts.sentence: Following hot weather flight testing last year, we are on track to deliver additional Midnight aircraft this year in preparation for initial passenger operations.
